downstream_desc: Customer country of residence. Join-enriched via Dim_Customer.CountryID → Dim_Country.Name. (Tier 2 — SP_AML_Documents_Dashboard, join-enriched via Dim_Country)
upstream_desc: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country upstream wiki)

merge.merged_desc: Customer country of residence. Full country name in English, used in compliance documents, UI dropdowns, and analytical reports. Join-enriched via Dim_Customer.CountryID → Dim_Country.Name.
merge.attribution: (Tier 1 - Dim_Country.Name; Tier 2 - SP_AML_Documents_Dashboard for join enrichment via Dim_Country)
merge.notes: Upstream adds semantic context (English full name, compliance/UI usage) that downstream lacked. Local join mechanics preserved.

downstream_desc: Name of the acquisition funnel the customer entered, from `DWH_dbo.Dim_Funnel.Name` on `Dim_Customer.FunnelID`. NULL if no funnel. (Tier 2 — Dim_Funnel.Name via Dim_Customer.FunnelID)
upstream_desc: Unique human-readable label for the funnel. Used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Describes the campaign/channel/product that drove registration. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Funnel)

merge.merged_desc: Name of the acquisition funnel the customer entered. Human-readable label describing the campaign, channel, or product that drove registration; used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Sourced from Dim_Funnel.Name via Dim_Customer.FunnelID. NULL if no funnel is assigned.
merge.attribution: (Tier 1 — Dim_Funnel.Name / Dictionary.Funnel; Tier 2 — joined via Dim_Customer.FunnelID)
merge.notes: Upstream adds business context: funnel labels describe campaign/channel/product and are used in marketing and attribution reporting.

downstream_desc: Name of the source funnel (referral funnel), from `DWH_dbo.Dim_Funnel.Name` on `Dim_Customer.FunnelFromID`. LEFT JOIN — NULL when no source funnel. (Tier 2 — Dim_Funnel.Name via Dim_Customer.FunnelFromID)
upstream_desc: Unique human-readable label for the funnel. Used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Describes the campaign/channel/product that drove registration. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Funnel)

merge.merged_desc: Name of the source (referral) funnel. Human-readable label describing the campaign, channel, or product that drove the referring customer's registration; used in marketing reports, BackOffice customer views, and attribution analytics. Sourced from Dim_Funnel.Name via Dim_Customer.FunnelFromID. LEFT JOIN — NULL when no source funnel exists.
merge.attribution: (Tier 1 — Dim_Funnel.Name / Dictionary.Funnel; Tier 2 — joined via Dim_Customer.FunnelFromID)
merge.notes: Upstream adds business context for what the funnel label represents; downstream referral-funnel semantics and NULL behaviour preserved.
